title: mentha castriferrensis
intro: Mentha castriferrensis, also known as Spanish mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant contains menthol and other compounds that possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Mentha castriferrensis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. It can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for topical and internal use, as well as added to food and beverages for its distinctive flavor and aroma.
